summary: Conversational-action v0.2 — three on-demand catalog loaders. Wires the v0.1 catalog primitives through ContextHierarchy Tier 2 segment (dispatch instruction), SelfKnowledgeTree probe (live catalog renderer), and Playbook manifest item (relevance signal). All three load paths are on-demand by design; the catalog content lives only in the probe (dynamic, generated fresh per call). The segment and Playbook item are pointers, never the catalog body. Semantic correctness test asserts Tier 1 loadTier output does NOT contain the conversational-actions segment content — prevents future regression to AGENT.md inlining (L1 bloat lesson). Final v1.0 framework functional parity task.
